call-quality-menu: Using your dial pad buttons, please rate the sound quality of this call on a scale of one to four, with one being best. Or if the call dropped, press 5. If it never connected, press 6. If one party could not hear, press 7. For any other problem, press 8. Thank you for helping.

conf-unlockednow: This conference has just been unlocked.

could-lose-a-few-pounds: You could lose a few pounds.
demo-abouttotry: Please wait while we establish a test connection to Digium. Note that this does require a working internet connection of at least 28.8 kilovits per second. One moment.
demo-congrats: Congratulations! This Asterisk system is up and working. Sample sounds and configuration files have also been installed, which you can modify for your application. Don't forget, you're on a telephone now, and we'll need to select options using your touchtone keypad. If you're using a soft phone, note that you have controls to simulate, answer, and hang up, as well as a virtual dial pad.
demo-echotest: In the following echo test, a distance system will immediately repeat anything it hears from you. Any delay you notice will indicate the amount of latency between the two systems. To end the test, press pound or hang up. Connecting...
demo-enterkeywords: Enter one or more key words separated by star. When finished, press pound.
demo-instruct: To learn more about Asterisk, press 2. To establish a test connection to another Asterisk system, ensure this server is connected to the internet and dial 500. Once established, you may perform an echo test by dialing 600. This sample configuration includes a single user at extension 1, 2, 3, 4, with a passcode of 4, 2, 4, 2. Diling this test extension will attempt to ring the console. If the test extension is busy or unavailable, you will be directed to voicemail and can leave a message. To check messages, dial 8500 to disconnect, dial pound.
demo-moreinfo: Asterisk is an open source, full-featured private branch exchange and interactive voice response system running on the Linux operating system. For more information, visit www.Asterisk.org. This is Pat Fleet. For more information on obtaining matching custom recordings in my voice, visit www.patfleet.com.
demo-nogo: We were unable to establish a connection to the test system. Please ensure this system is connected to the internet and try again. You may also find helpful debug information in this system's asterisk console.
demo-nomatch: No match was found for those key words.
demo-thanks: Thank you for using the Astrosque open-source PBX. Goodbye!
dial-here-often: So, do you dial here often?

lyrics-louie-louie: Louie Louie, me got to go, Louie Louie, me got to go, Find little girl, she waits for me, me catch the ship for across the sea, Me sail the ship all alone, me never thinks me, make it home. Three nights and days, me sail the sea, me think of girl constantly. On the ship by dream she dare, I smelled the rose in her hair. Me see Jamaica moon above, it won't belong me see my love. I take her in my arms and then, me tell her I never leave again.

tones-that-follow-are-for-the-deaf: The tones that follow are for the deaf.
touchtone1: If you are calling from a rotary dial phone, please hang up and purchase a touchtone telephone at a local retailer. You will not be able to use any touchtone controlled service including this one until you do so.
touchtone2: And if you are calling from a rotary dial phone, well, look, it's about time to step into the light. We don't bill you for touchtone service anymore and the money you've saved easily covers the cost of a new touchtone phone, don't you think?
touchtone3: If you are calling from a rotary phone, please hang up. Get in your car or any other form of transportation and drive to a telephone store or most any other electronics retailer. Purchase a touchstone telephone. This is the kind with buttons on it. Come back, plug in your new phone, and redial your call.
transfer: One moment while your call is connected.
tt-allbusy: We're sorry. All members of this household are busy with other telemarketers. Please stay on the line and your call will be answered in the order received.
tt-monkeysintro: They have been spirited away by flying monkeys.
tt-weasels: Purple weasels have eaten this telephone equipment.
twisty-maze: You are in a maze of twisty little menus all alike.
unidentified-no-callback: Unidentified or with health and therefore cannot be called back.
visit-asterisk-website: Visit the Asterisk website at www.Asterisk.org.

vm-msginstruct: For the next message press 6 to repeat this message press 5 for the previous message press 4 to delete this message press 0 to exit press pound.

vm-newuser: Welcome to your new voicemail box. To use this system we'll need to go through a short setup process. Let's get started.

vm-opts: To change folders, press 2, for advanced options, press 3, for mailbox options, press 0.
vm-opts-full: For Archive Messages, press 2 to send a message to another user, press 3 to change your greetings or password, press 0.
